question: Will I be promoted to Mana Gold by 12 am May 31, 2026?
textDescription:
Can it even be done?

Update 2026-05-24 (PST) (AI summary of creator comment): Market resolves YES if the requirements for promotion to Gold are met by the deadline, regardless of when/how the league closes. Resolves NO otherwise.

Update 2026-05-24 (PST) (AI summary of creator comment): Promotion must occur on or before May 31 to resolve YES. Even if promotion happens after May 31 (e.g., due to league processing timing), the market will resolve NO.
newsShortReason: Promotion requirements are stringent and time is limited.
newsKeyEvidence: Promotion requires a single deposit of at least $1,000 and trading 18 lots for Classic accounts or 30 lots for ECN accounts. | The promotion period runs from January 1 to December 31, 2026. | The promotion is available to clients from permitted countries.
